title: Project Telos Sixth-Wave Live OSS Scout Claims

claims.text: The sixth-wave live GitHub scout produced a project-telos.oss-scout/v1 packet with status MATCH and three candidates.
claims.falsification: The live scout output is missing, has the wrong schema, is not MATCH, or does not contain three candidates.

claims.text: The top live scout candidate is pandas-dev/pandas#63458 with priority 60 and updated_at 2026-06-27T23:25:33Z.
claims.falsification: The generated top-candidate packet names a different candidate, has a different priority, or records a different updated_at value.

claims.text: The live top-candidate readiness packet is blocked with pr_ready false, operator_next_action revise, verdict UNVERIFIABLE, and missing-evidence blockers.
claims.falsification: The generated live packet is PR-ready, chooses open-pr, carries MATCH, or omits blockers for missing reproduction, missing passing tests, non-MATCH verifier verdict, or missing patch summary.

claims.text: The sixth-wave demo document distinguishes live GitHub intake from code inspection, test execution, maintainer contact, and PR readiness.
claims.falsification: The demo document claims source inspection, tests, maintainer contact, or PR readiness from the live scout alone.

claims.text: The sixth-wave content queue packages the live scout, the blocked packet, and the next local reproduction step for the parallel posting session.
claims.falsification: The content queue omits the live scout, omits the blocked packet, or suggests posting an upstream PR claim before local reproduction.
